Vite Deployed to GitHub Pages but _plugin-vue_export-helper Returns 404

Vite builds and ships to GitHub Pages fine — but once you load the page, the dynamically imported _plugin-vue_export-helper module 404s and the page goes blank. This post walks through the actual cause (Rollup's filename sanitization producing a name GitHub Pages doesn't serve) and the vite.config.js tweak that fixes it.
BetterDiscord: How to Customize and Power Up Your Discord

Discord keeps blowing up — even companies are dropping Slack for it. But sometimes the default UI just isn't enough, and you want a more comfortable, customised setup. This post walks through using BetterDiscord to customise and enhance your Discord on macOS.
Don't Know How to Screenshot? Let Me Teach You — Windows and Mac in One Go
Screenshotting is something we use constantly, so here's a quick share of how to screenshot on Mac and Windows. And please — when possible, avoid using your phone to photograph the screen ~
Discord Bots I've Used (and the Security Risks You Should Know)

I help maintain my company's Discord server, and people keep DM'ing me to ask which bots I use and how to invite Discord bots into their own servers. So here's a writeup of the bots I've used — at a high level, no deep configuration — plus a section at the end about Discord bot hacks and what to do if you're worried.
Discord Beginner's Guide: From Sign-Up to Daily Use (Complete Walkthrough)

A complete beginner's walkthrough of Discord — roles, channel icons, threads, Markdown syntax, search, and all the basics. Aimed at folks who just joined a tech community on Discord and want to find their footing.
Clear LINE's Link Preview Cache With Page Poker

LINE is everywhere as a sharing channel, but once a link's been shared, LINE caches the preview aggressively — and there's no obvious way to bust the cache. Until you discover Page Poker. This post covers LINE's official Page Poker tool for clearing link preview cache, plus Facebook's Sharing Debugger as the equivalent for Facebook.
Use Google Apps Script + Google Sheets to Spin Up a Quick API

Sometimes you just need a quick API and don't want to stand up a whole backend (Koa, Express, Laravel — too much for a one-off). Google Apps Script + Google Sheets gets you there fast — sheet as the database, GAS as the lightweight server. This post walks through creating the sheet, reading rows, exposing them as a GET endpoint, deploying as a Web App, and formatting the response as clean JSON.
How to Enable 2FA on Discord (Step-by-Step Guide to Protect Your Account)

How do you enable 2FA (two-factor authentication) on Discord? This step-by-step guide walks through setting it up with Google Authenticator, plus SMS authorization and backup codes so you won't get locked out if your phone dies.
How to Clear the Terminal Screen (Mac and Windows)

Whether you're on Mac or Windows, the terminal piles up output fast and it gets noisy. Quick note on the commands and keyboard shortcuts that clear the screen — including the distinction between "actually wiping scrollback" vs. "just scrolling the cursor down so the screen looks empty".
Udemy Tip: Translate Subtitles in Real Time With a Translation Extension + JS Snippet

Udemy has great courses, but lots of them are in English. If you'd rather watch with subtitles in another language, you can use a browser translation extension to translate the transcript panel — but the video's own subtitle overlay stays in English. This post shares a small JS snippet you can paste into the browser console to mirror the translated transcript onto the video's subtitle overlay in real time.
